name: Technical Documentation Workflow
description: Create technical documentation from code: API docs, tutorials, examples, and troubleshooting guides

steps.name: code-analysis
steps.prompt_template:
Analyze this code thoroughly. Identify all functions, classes, methods, parameters, return values, and important implementation details:

{{input}}

steps.name: api-reference
steps.prompt_template:
Generate comprehensive API reference documentation from this analysis. Include all endpoints, parameters, request/response examples, and error codes:

{{code_analysis}}

steps.name: getting-started
steps.prompt_template:
Create a getting started guide with installation, basic setup, and hello world example:

{{code_analysis}}

steps.name: tutorials
steps.prompt_template:
Create step-by-step tutorials for common use cases:

{{code_analysis}}

steps.name: troubleshooting
steps.prompt_template:
Create a troubleshooting guide with common issues, error messages, and solutions based on this code:

{{code_analysis}}

steps.name: assemble-documentation
